acceptance_criteria: All notification kinds emit events on correct User channel; no error when no subscribers; notifications emitted within 100ms of creation
description:
When a notification row is created (mention, favourite, reblog, follow, follow_request), emit a 'notification' event on the User(account_id) streaming channel for the notified account. The event payload is the full Notification JSON object.

TEST DISCIPLINE:
- Create a mention → 'notification' event on User(mentioned_account_id) channel
- Favourite a post → 'notification' event on User(post_author_id) channel
- New follower → 'notification' event on User(followed_account_id) channel
- Notification to account with no active SSE/WS connection → event sent to channel (no error even if no subscribers)

DEFENSIVE PROGRAMMING:
- tokio::broadcast::Sender::send() returns Err if no receivers — this is normal, not an error, do not log at WARN
title: Emit notification streaming events on notification create
